title: Mood Hall
synopsis: “33 minutes and 33 seconds we need before the end of this world.” A dying earth. Mood Hall, a magical game played by the surviving people. A mysterious middle-aged gentleman and a beautiful woman who appear and disappear. Little People. Giants. Party. Deserts. The bottom of the pool. Dance. Repeated day and night. A dense labyrinthine world of experimental, artistic, adventurous, half-sci-fi, half-mystery sketches. A masterpiece of a film that takes you to a world where you can only see and hear, without words! (Source: moodhall.com) Notes: - An early version was presented in 2016 as an installation work in a Kawai+Okamura retrospective exhibition. - The 2019 movie version was rereleased with a new soundtrack in 2022, under the title 'Mood Hall side B'.

title: RABBITS KINGDOM THE MOVIE
titleNative: ラビッツキングダム THE MOVIE
synopsis: A project to commemorate the 10th Anniversary of Tsukiuta. The Black Rabbit Kingdom and the White Rabbit Kingdom — Two different worlds existing side by side. The two worlds, which were supposed to be a "pair," had never met, perhaps by a twist of fate. The situation remained unstable and incomplete. Hajime, the young king of the Balck Rabbit Kingdom, is distressed by the calamities in the surrounding countries. The Prime Minister Haru, his close aides Kakeru and Koi, the prince Aoi, and his escort Arata are busy preparing for the upcoming World Congress and the ball to commemorate the 15th anniversary of Hajime's reign. At the same time, in the White Rabbit Kingdom at the suggestion of Shuno, who calls himself the Demon King, the king, Kai, the prince, Rui, the guards, Yoh and Iku, and the former military officer, Yoru, are going on a "picnic" to the Black Rabbit Kingdom. What will be born from the encounter between the Black Rabbit Kingdom and the White Rabbit Kingdom? (Source: Crunc

title: Ryusui-kaen
synopsis: A short animation drawn on Washi paper and Cel with a marker and animex. Some Kanji (they are used in the Japanese poem “Iroha uta”) metamorphose into various creatures. (Source: Kraut Film)

title: The garden of five fingers
synopsis: A stop motion animation using several phenakistoscopes of polyhedron and other materials. Five “Egg birds” appears in the artificial garden. (Source: Kraut Film)

title: The paper house
synopsis: A very short animation drawn on tracing paper with a brush pen and colored pencil. “This work was inspired by an impressive dream. In the dream, I took a dictionary that printed flip-books in the corner from a book shelf, and when I returned it, the book had disappeared.” [Yuko Asano] (Source: Kraut Film)

title: Squishy Fish Eggs
synopsis: When I touched the sack of cod roe for the first time, it felt exactly like my thighs. It was light pink and so soft. Maybe my whole world is made of squishy fish eggs. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: Representation of Light
synopsis: My deceased great-grandmother had been a part of my life as a portrait on the wall. I searched for ways to substantiate her life inside me and decided to photograph and develop pictures of her at two different ages. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: Behind Us
synopsis: One day a girl notices a distortion in her surrounding environment, which prompts her to start searching for her own connection with the world. But, the distortions become even more extreme. She wonders if the deviation is happening within her, or in the outside world. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: In My Room
synopsis: This installation work is inspired by dreams experienced during a fever. The two-minute looping animation visualizes incoherent nightmares seen intermittently when having a hallucinatory fever. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: to day plus one
synopsis: We go to sleep in hopes for a better tomorrow. The moment of truth nears as our eyes slowly open to the new day… (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: Vapor Trail
synopsis: In 2079, the world's first orbital elevator was built in the Pacific Ocean to commemorate the peace that mankind regained after the 3rd World War. However, during the completion ceremony, a huge red humanoid object appears from outer space. It was so powerful that mankind was defeated in vain resistance. The orbital elevator was occupied, and since then mankind has entered a war with the red hostile flying object "Vacant" flying from there. Summer 2099. "It's been 20 years since the war started." Humanity developed the humanoid 7th generation fighter "Seventh" and succeeded in suppressing "Vacant" to the vicinity of the orbital elevator. Yashima military base floating in the Pacific Ocean. A woman who belongs to the special technology research department, Miku, drives the black forward wing Seventh F/SX-02 Tenra and flies in the blue sky. Together with the personality data of Liza, a girl who was once separated, stored in the machine's computer. Just to be together. A yuri mecha movie
